x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Regulatory framework mapping enables Now Assist GRC to provide framework-specific AI compliance recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map controls and policies to relevant regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST, HIPAA) via sn_compliance_authority_document. Now Assist uses framework context for AI compliance guidance.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Regulatory framework mapping enables Now Assist GRC to provide framework-specific AI compliance recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>GRC Framework Mapping</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_compliance_authority_document');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active authority documents / frameworks';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' regulatory frameworks mapped — Now Assist GRC can provide framework-specific AI compliance guidance.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' framework(s) mapped (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC compliance recommendations will be limited to a narrow regulatory scope.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No regulatory frameworks mapped. Now Assist GRC requires framework context (e.g. SOC2, ISO27001, NIST) for AI compliance recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>GRC</module>
<number>CHK0006085</number>
<order>60</order>
<remediation_guidance>Map controls and policies to relevant regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST, HIPAA) via sn_compliance_authority_document. Now Assist uses framework context for AI compliance guidance.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cc7</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
